mapper.sql: r.id, r.rule_name AS ruleName, r.attendance_days AS attendanceDays, r.attendance_threshold AS attendanceThreshold, r.purchase_days AS purchaseDays, r.purchase_threshold AS purchaseThreshold, r.status AS status, r.remark AS remark, r.created_by AS createdBy, r.updated_by AS updatedBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(r.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pt_group_to_private_rule (rule_name, attendance_days, attendance_threshold, purchase_days, purchase_threshold, status, remark, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{attendanceDays}, #{attendanceThreshold}, #{purchaseDays}, #{purchaseThreshold}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM pt_group_to_private_rule WHERE id IN
#{id}
